scope.target: source configuration and downstream template ownership planning
constraints: Keep ADR-001 Proposed until owner review
Do not assign a release without compatibility evidence
Do not change package payload in this workflow
Preserve the tactical evidence rule until atomic replacement

steps: Inspect source and downstream configuration ownership
Create CFG-001 with release classification gates
execution.last_completed_step: Recorded Proposed ADR-001 and durable CFG-001 without changing package behavior.
execution.next_action: Review ADR-001 and reproduce downstream impact before release assignment.

results.summary: Preserved the source-versus-downstream configuration boundary as a Proposed ADR and an unassigned backlog with patch/minor classification criteria.
tests_run: repository-native workflow, backlog, AI-context, version, JSON, and diff checks
results.residual_risk: The v0.5.0 downstream templates retain current source-root configuration until CFG-001 is implemented.
